coin_profile.name: NEAR Protocol
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.
coin_profile.description: NEAR Protocol is a developer-friendly Layer 1 blockchain with a focus on usability and scalability. It uses a sharding technique called Nightshade to achieve high throughput. NEAR is notable for its human-readable account names and low transaction costs.

NEAR.name: NEAR Protocol

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (deep bear) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.5/10 and survivability 86.7%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: How we valued this token: We treat this like a small business. It earns fees every time someone uses it, so we look at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it. We combine up to three simple checks: (1) How busy is the network? More activity usually means more value. (2) Is the market cap cheap or expensive compared to the fees it earns? (3) What price would make sense given its size rank? The Speculative Fair Value is the average of whichever checks produced a sensible result.
forecast_meta.growth_explanation: Base (10.0%/yr): projected growth based on this token's quality score (7.5/10). Bull (17.0%/yr): adoption accelerates and network usage grows strongly. Bear (-12.0%/yr): adoption slows or competition erodes the token's position. Unlike stocks, crypto has no analyst EPS forecasts. These rates are based purely on quality and network strength — treat them as a rough guide, not a precise prediction.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Fee-based methods (Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple) used DeFiLlama protocol fee data to anchor the valuation. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple produced a value below 10% of current price (fees are low relative to market cap) — shown in the breakdown chart but excluded from the median pool. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value (MC/Volume ratio) confirmed the NVT signal and contributed to the median pool. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

NEAR.iv_method: Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: Current market fear environment may create a near-term mean reversion opportunity in NEAR Protocol
Any positive news catalyst — exchange listing, partnership, or protocol upgrade — could trigger a sharp near-term rally from current levels
Crypto market sentiment is cyclical — NEAR Protocol's short-term setup may improve as macro uncertainty fades
bear_points: Up 16% in the past week — rapid short-term move increases likelihood of a pullback before the next leg higher
Regulatory developments in major markets could create short-term selling pressure
Without a near-term catalyst, NEAR Protocol may continue to consolidate or drift lower

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain fee data confirms the protocol has generated real revenue across both bull and bear market cycles
Over 100% of the maximum supply is already in circulation — future dilution risk is minimal for long-term holders
Quality score of 7.5/10 (Safe) places NEAR Protocol among the better-quality protocols in the crypto universe
bear_points: MC/Fees of 473x prices in substantial fee growth that has not yet materialised — long-term holders need adoption to accelerate
Technology or regulatory disruption risk cannot be ruled out over a 3-5 year horizon
Long-term execution risk remains a key variable for any crypto investment

metric_assessments.fee_growth: Fee Growth is solid, meeting the expectations you would expect for a protocol at this stage.
metric_assessments.capital_efficiency: Capital Efficiency is middling (473.0 MC/fees ratio). The numbers are acceptable but leave room for improvement.
metric_assessments.holder_value_accrual: Holder Value Accrual is a clear strength (100.0 % of fees to holders), placing this token well above most peers on this dimension.
metric_assessments.network_demand: Network Demand is a clear strength (17.96 volume/MC %), placing this token well above most peers on this dimension.
metric_assessments.dilution_control: Dilution Control is a clear strength (100.0 circulating %), placing this token well above most peers on this dimension.
metric_assessments.protocol_maturity: Protocol Maturity is solid (48 MC rank), meeting the expectations you would expect for a protocol at this stage.

quality_narrative.classification_reason: NEAR Protocol earns a Safe rating because its fundamentals score 7.5/10 as a Cash-Flow Protocol, above the threshold that distinguishes established protocols from speculative ones. Its standout strength is holder value accrual. The relatively controlled token supply reduces dilution risk.
quality_narrative.investment_narrative: NEAR Protocol is a Cash-Flow Protocol with strong fundamentals, scoring 7.5/10 overall. Its clearest strength is holder value accrual, while capital efficiency remains the main area to watch. No major structural red flags in the current data. NEAR Protocol is suitable for investors seeking more established crypto exposure with lower protocol-level risk.
quality_narrative.quality_conclusion: NEAR Protocol scores 7.5/10 (Safe) as a Cash-Flow Protocol. The overall quality profile reflects the protocol's maturity, fee economics, and token supply dynamics relative to peers.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 4.7/10 and survivability 56.7%. Base: 3.0% p.a., Bull: 9.0% p.a., Bear: -29.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: How we valued this token: We treat this like a small business. It earns fees every time someone uses it, so we look at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it. We combine up to three simple checks: (1) How busy is the network? More activity usually means more value. (2) Is the market cap cheap or expensive compared to the fees it earns? (3) What price would make sense given its size rank? The Speculative Fair Value is the average of whichever checks produced a sensible result.
forecast_meta.growth_explanation: Base (3.0%/yr): projected growth based on this token's quality score (4.7/10). Bull (9.0%/yr): adoption accelerates and network usage grows strongly. Bear (-29.0%/yr): adoption slows or competition erodes the token's position. The bear scenario is steeper than usual because survivability is only 56.7% — this token has weaker dilution control or holder value accrual, making it more vulnerable in a downturn.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) did not contribute to the median: the implied fair value fell outside the 0.1x–10x price bounds (volume is very low or very high relative to circulating supply). Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Only 1 method contributed to the median — the valuation should be treated as a rough anchor, not a precise fair value. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 4.8/10 and survivability 33.3%. Base: 3.0% p.a., Bull: 9.0% p.a., Bear: -37.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: How we valued this token: We treat this like a small business. It earns fees every time someone uses it, so we look at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it. We combine up to three simple checks: (1) How busy is the network? More activity usually means more value. (2) Is the market cap cheap or expensive compared to the fees it earns? (3) What price would make sense given its size rank? The Speculative Fair Value is the average of whichever checks produced a sensible result.
forecast_meta.growth_explanation: Base (3.0%/yr): projected growth based on this token's quality score (4.8/10). Bull (9.0%/yr): adoption accelerates and network usage grows strongly. Bear (-37.0%/yr): adoption slows or competition erodes the token's position. The bear scenario is steeper than usual because survivability is only 33.3% — this token has weaker dilution control or holder value accrual, making it more vulnerable in a downturn.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value (MC/Volume ratio) confirmed the NVT signal and contributed to the median pool. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

NMR.iv_method: Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

quality_narrative.classification_reason: Numeraire carries a Dangerous rating because its fundamentals score only 4.8/10 as a Cash-Flow Protocol, with notable weaknesses in protocol maturity. Dangerous-rated tokens carry a higher risk of permanent capital loss and should only be held with strict position sizing and a clear exit plan.
quality_narrative.investment_narrative: Numeraire is a Cash-Flow Protocol with weak fundamentals, scoring 4.8/10 overall. Its clearest strength is network demand, while protocol maturity remains the main area to watch. Key risks: low protocol maturity score (1/10). Numeraire warrants caution and should only be held as a small position with a clear thesis and defined risk limits.
quality_narrative.quality_conclusion: Numeraire scores 4.8/10 (Dangerous) as a Cash-Flow Protocol. The overall quality profile reflects the protocol's maturity, fee economics, and token supply dynamics relative to peers.

coin_profile.name: ChangeNOW
coin_profile.bucket_explanation: A Cash-Flow Protocol is a blockchain or app that earns real money from its users — just like a business. Every time someone makes a trade, borrows money, or uses the network, it collects a small fee. The more people use it, the more fees it earns. We value these tokens similarly to how you would value a business — by looking at how much it earns versus what investors are paying for it.
coin_profile.description: ChangeNOW (NOW) — a Cash-Flow Protocol ranked #460 by market cap.
